plugins.name: ComfyUI Manager
plugins.why: Install, update, disable, and repair custom nodes from inside ComfyUI.
plugins.notes: Install this first. It is the safest long-term plugin management path.

plugins.name: ComfyUI Impact Pack
plugins.why: Detector, detailer, upscaler, pipe helpers, and face/detail polish.
plugins.notes: Great for poster covers, close-ups, and fixing key character shots.

plugins.name: ControlNet Auxiliary Preprocessors
plugins.why: Pose, depth, lineart, and edge preprocessors for directed scenes.
plugins.notes: Use for shot blocking, actor pose control, and repeatable scene layouts.

plugins.name: ComfyUI IPAdapter Plus
plugins.why: Reference-image conditioning for character identity and visual style.
plugins.notes: Repository is maintenance-only, but still valuable for SDXL identity workflows.

plugins.name: Video Helper Suite
plugins.why: Load, batch, combine, preview, and export image sequences as video.
plugins.notes: The backbone for image-sequence based drama rendering.

plugins.name: AnimateDiff Evolved
plugins.why: Advanced AnimateDiff motion workflows and sampling support.
plugins.notes: Use for stylized short motion, teaser loops, and low-cost scene movement.

plugins.name: WanVideoWrapper
plugins.why: Wan video generation wrapper for higher-end image/video-to-video scenes.
plugins.notes: GPU and model requirements are heavier; keep it in the pro profile.

plugins.name: Frame Interpolation
plugins.why: RIFE, FILM, AMT, and related VFI nodes for smoother final shots.
plugins.notes: Useful after AnimateDiff or Wan output, especially for vertical drama exports.

plugins.name: Ultimate SD Upscale
plugins.why: Tile-based upscale for posters, covers, and hero frames.
plugins.notes: Pair with Impact Pack detailers for final delivery frames.

plugins.name: ComfyUI Custom Scripts
plugins.why: Workflow UI improvements for faster daily production.
plugins.notes: Quality-of-life plugin, not required for render correctness.

plugins.name: WAS Node Suite
plugins.why: Large utility node set for text, image, mask, and file operations.
plugins.notes: Powerful but broad; install after the core stack is stable.
